note: Fixed argon2 derivation vectors for the react-native-argon2 2.0.1 -> 4.0.0 upgrade. For every entry in 'mustMatch', rawHash AND encodedHash must be byte-identical between the version that produced the golden capture (2.0.1, current production) and the candidate (4.0.0). Any mismatch means derived keys would change. DO NOT edit this file once goldens are captured.

mustMatch.why: The real production path: jsa_argon2.js passes {} when no options are supplied, so this exercises the library DEFAULTS (t=2, m=32768, p=1, len=32, argon2id).
Same params spelled out explicitly; must equal default-empty-options.

mustMatch.password: legal winner thank year wave sausage worth useful legal winner thank yellow
mustMatch.why: BIP39-style mnemonic as the password to mirror the seed-phrase -> key derivation path.

mustMatch.password: correct horse battery staple - cafe coffee unicode test
mustMatch.why: Guards against UTF-8 handling differences in the password path.
Confirms the argon2i mode selector maps identically across the CatCrypto -> Argon2Swift swap.
Confirms the argon2d mode selector maps identically across the CatCrypto -> Argon2Swift swap.
Non-default cost params in case any call site overrides the defaults; also exercises a 64-byte hash length.

controls_expectedToDiverge.why: FOOTGUN DEMO - expected to DIFFER between versions. 2.0.1 has no saltEncoding option (treats salt as its 64 utf8 bytes); 4.0.0 decodes it to 32 hex bytes. A mismatch here is the PASS condition and proves why you must never enable saltEncoding:'hex' during the upgrade.
